chat_history.content: Find me 5 differentiated captive management firm providing outsourced administration, regulatory compliance, financial management, and operational oversight for captive insurance companies, allowing owners to operate their captives without maintaining dedicated internal staff. companies in NCP Priority Geography (Eastern US).

Got it. I know what NCP looks for — founder-owned, differentiated, right to win, growing market, no PE on the cap table. I'll search multiple channels and only bring you companies I'm genuinely excited about (conviction 6+/10). You'll get 5 with investment memos. Give me feedback on each one and I'll learn your preferences.
